_meta.purpose: Sample SKU brief for development, testing, and demo runs — US West variant of Alpine Harvest trail mix
_meta.data_origin: This is the US West variant of the global Alpine Harvest trail mix line. The same sku_id (alpine-harvest-trail-mix) is used across all 4 regional variants (us-west, latam, apac, eu), demonstrating the regional packaging automation scenario. 'Alpine Harvest' is a fictional CPG brand created for this exercise — no real brand is implied.
design_rationale: Same sku_id across regions (alpine-harvest-trail-mix) shows regional packaging automation: S3 paths become alpine-harvest-trail-mix/{region}/{format}/{product}.png
Two product variants (Original + Dark Chocolate) satisfy the exercise requirement of multi-SKU generation in a single run
Organic trail mix is brand-agnostic and avoids IP/trademark concerns
Pacific Northwest cultural context drives distinct regional visual direction vs. LATAM/APAC/EU variants

cultural_context: Pacific Northwest outdoor lifestyle. Warm neutral earth tones — tan, forest green, aged cedar. Imagery of mountain trails, pine cones, and Pacific coastal foliage.

products.name: Alpine Harvest Trail Mix
products.description: Classic Pacific Northwest blend of almonds, cashews, dried cranberries, and pumpkin seeds for sustained trail energy

products.name: Alpine Harvest Trail Mix
products.description: Pacific Northwest trail mix elevated with fair-trade dark chocolate chips, walnuts, and tart dried cherries

audience: outdoor enthusiasts and health-conscious adults 25-45 in the Pacific Northwest
